title: RSA key parsed on every signature
description: federation.rs rsa_sha256_sign() parses the PEM private key from scratch on every call. In the delivery worker hot path (deliver_one -> sign_post_headers -> rsa_sha256_sign), this means re-parsing the same PEM on every outbound delivery. For a server with many followers and a burst of posts, this is wasted CPU. The key could be parsed once per delivery batch (or once per worker lifetime) and reused.
